title: workload widget - add Name by, and Label by settings.

Description

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The Gantt Chart already has a label by option which works really well with a formula column when you Concatenate multiple text columns. Would love this functionality in the workload widget. Would be even better if you can change the default naming convention. It currently does ‘Item Name | Board Name’

What are you trying to achieve

More settings options for the Workload Widget.
